13.654m^3/s correction added is from Murray River Near the Mouth 07FB002 to the Pine River At East Pine 07FB001 becasue the Pine River is measured above the confluence of the Murray and the Pine Rivers due to poor ice condition at the station downstream of the confluence.  The Area, Width and Velocity have been changed to N/A under dispatch because they do not describe the conditions at the actual station. QM on Pine River above confluence with Murray. Gauge on Pine below confluence with Murray River. Therefore add Murray River near the Mouth Q taken on Mar 25 which was 13.654 m3/s to the Pine Q above confluence which was 12.0551 m3/s to get total Q of 25.7 m3/s. Uploaded QM numbers re: width, velocity, etc are from QM on Pine above confluence.
